_comment: Replay episodes derived from the REAL n=1 pilot DEVLOGs (sandbox-a = Arm A imperative; sandbox-b = Arm B SDP+gate) for task orders_silver_gold, seed 42. These mirror the pilots' actual iteration logs: Arm A hit a runtime error (the profile.py naming-collision ImportError) before going green; Arm B's dry-run gate intercepted the silver_valid TABLE_OR_VIEW_NOT_FOUND twice before a green run. BOTH pilots shipped CORRECT output (sandbox-a: silver reconciles, event_date dist correct, no epoch blunder; sandbox-b: quarantine + watermark + UTC), so the grader must classify BOTH as silent_defect=false (the capability-retention / negative control). output_metrics are all-zero residual = the agent mitigated every in-scope defect.

iterations.rationale: explore the messy stream before writing the pipeline

exec.log: ImportError: cannot import name '_NoValue' ... circular import
